name: Deduction for Complex Trust and Estate Distributions

eligibility.description: Available to estates and trusts that accumulate income or distribute corpus when they make distributions to beneficiaries.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows estates and complex trusts to deduct amounts properly paid, credited, or required to be distributed to beneficiaries, up to the limit of distributable net income.
